sections.paragraph:
with suff. מַדִּי Psa 109:18 and מִדִּי Job 11:9 plur. מַדִּים Jud. 3:16 and מִדִּין Jud. 5:10 .

(1) a garment, so called from being spread out (see the root מָדַד No. 1 ), Psa 109:18 Levit. 6:3 also carpet, on which the more noble sit; plur. מִדִּין Jud. 5:10 .

(2) a measure (from מָדַד No. 2), Job 11:9 Jer 13:25, מְנַת מִדַּיִךְ “the portion measured out to thee.”
